scope_boundary: Synthetic benchmark-ratchet, metric-provenance, policy-update, and steward-action gate behavior plus external benchmark-science vocabulary and one six-project local lineage only; no live benchmark run, contamination audit, hidden-holdout validation, policy-training result, steward execution, independent reproduction, or model-quality evidence is promoted.
transition_reason: The repository has exact source mappings, benchmark-ratchet and metric-provenance schemas, synthetic anti-Goodhart fixtures, external benchmark-science notes, and a blocked six-project lineage record with ten rejecting mutations. Those artifacts support regression preservation, closure inheritance, metric-origin classification, representation-capacity gates, retry ceilings, checkpoint/output binding, holdout and contamination requirements, reward-as-truth refusal, and release approval linkage. They do not reproduce project metrics or establish benchmark quality, hidden-holdout integrity, contamination detection, transfer performance, policy-training quality, reward-hacking resistance, steward behavior, release safety, or any live model result.
required_artifacts: versioned benchmark run records with model, environment, prompts, metrics, and raw outputs
hidden-holdout or private-evaluation procedure with custody and leakage controls
contamination audit against the evaluated artifacts and task sources
mutation or transfer checks tied to explicit benchmark-ratchet records
negative-result retention and stale-score invalidation workflow
policy-training or steward-action traces only when those claims are made
independent review of source interpretation adequacy
accepted upward evidence-transition review for any narrowed stronger claim
metric observation, evaluator, target-capacity, retry-lineage, closure-inheritance, and checkpoint/output records for any admitted capability metric
verification_command: python3 scripts/validate_benchmark_antigoodhart.py && python3 scripts/validate_metric_provenance.py && python3 scripts/validate_source_evidence_audit.py && python3 scripts/validate_source_notes.py && python3 scripts/validate_v1_status_snapshot.py
negative_results: external benchmark-science sources are comparison vocabulary only
no GPQA, SWE-bench, LiveBench, hidden-holdout, contamination, mutation, transfer, policy-training, or steward-release run exists in this repository
source-reported, constant, proxy, and vacuous metric promotion is rejected
measured-without-observation and architecture-inexpressible metric promotion is rejected
retry-ceiling escape, incomplete checkpoint/output binding, and erased inherited regressions are rejected
downgrade_triggers: claim text interpreted as model-quality or live benchmark evidence
metric origin widened through prose or reporting
descendant benchmark silently drops inherited regressions or exclusions
architecture-inexpressible target or checkpoint/output disconnect admitted
equivalent retries escape their lineage ceiling
promotion_burden: Move above argument only after the claim is narrowed to the specific synthetic gate behavior that passed, or after benchmark run records, hidden-holdout integrity, contamination checks, mutation or transfer checks, negative-result retention, and source-interpretation review are recorded with accepted evidence-transition records.
limitations: synthetic fixtures do not prove benchmark quality
schemas validate record shape rather than benchmark validity
external benchmark literature is not a local reproduction or model result
no independent benchmark or source-interpretation review has been recorded
the six historical projects are one local lineage and were not reproduced on a shared workload
the blocked metric record does not establish an empirical result
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; not an independent benchmark, evaluation-science, or source-interpretation audit
acceptance_blockers: no mutation or transfer check against local artifacts
non_claims: does not promote Benchmark Ratchets above argument
does not prove steward-agent release safety or model behavior
does not treat six related local projects as independent confirmations
does not authorize publication of raw private project material
